jobDescriptions.title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer
jobDescriptions.description: We are seeking a Lead Full-Stack Engineer to build and scale our multi-tenant SaaS application pipelines. You will own the core architecture, design cloud services, and lead our software development sprint cycles.
requirements: Over 5 years of software development experience with modern JS/TS frameworks.
Proven track record of designing and scaling robust architectural frameworks.
Deep, hands-on production experience with React 18/19 and server-side Express implementations.
Familiarity with cloud hosting, CI/CD pipelines, and microservices engines.

jobDescriptions.title: Senior Product Designer
jobDescriptions.description: We are looking for a Senior Product Designer who is passionate about creating elegant, highly intuitive, and accessible user interfaces. You will work directly with our recruiters and developers to spearhead standard visual solutions.
requirements: 4+ years designing production-level SaaS platforms or consumer apps.
A portfolio showcasing complete UX discovery flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups.
Exceptional grasp of design system practices, prototyping interactions, and clean spacing concepts.
Basic front-end familiarity (Tailwind / HTML / CSS) to assist developers in seamless hand-offs.

jobDescriptions.title: Data Scientist - AI Solutions
jobDescriptions.description: Join our AI applications squad to pioneer state-of-the-art intelligent processing pipelines. You will build and fine-tune models, leverage Large Language Models (LLMs), and run performance telemetry.
requirements: 3+ years of experience analyzing data stacks and training machine learning algorithms.
Practical expertise utilizing LLMs (Gemini, Claude, GPT) and developing custom vector spaces.
Highly pro-efficient with Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, PyTorch).
Strong relational data modeling skills and experience with big data clusters.

candidates.name: R.L Varshithaneha
candidates.resumeText:
R.L Varshithaneha 
  Phone: 9347780820 
  Email: varshithaneharl@gmail.com  
  GitHub:https://github.com/22HR1A0590 
Professional Summary 
Motivated Cloud & DevOps fresher with hands-on training in AWS and Azure. Skilled in Linux administration, 
containerization, and CI/CD pipelines. Seeking an entry-level Cloud/DevOps Engineer role to contribute to scalable and 
automated infrastructure solutions. 
Technical Skills 
Cloud Platforms: AWS (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, RDS, Lambda, Auto Scaling, CloudWatch) 
Azure :VM, VNet, Storage, Azure AD 
DevOps Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, Git & GitHub 
Operating System: Linux (User management, File permissions, Networking, Shell scripting) 
Programming languages:Java & Python  
Projects 
  Multi-Tier Architecture on AWS  Designed secure 3-tier architecture using EC2, VPC, Auto Scaling & Load 
Balancer. Monitored performance using CloudWatch and implemented using Terraform. 
  Access Controlled Privacy Preserving Search on Secret-Shared Outsourced Data - Built a secure search 
system for encrypted cloud data using secret sharing techniques to protect sensitive information. Implemented 
access control to ensure only authorized users can retrieve data, and enabled privacy-preserving keyword search 
without exposing data or queries. Technologies: Cryptography, Cloud Computing, Access Control 
Internships 
Cloud Institution  Cloud & DevOps Intern 19.01.2026  Present 
  Deployed AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC) 
  Automated provisioning using Terraform & Ansible 
  Built CI/CD pipelines and managed Docker containers 
Skill Dzire  Full Stack Java Intern  12.04.2025  12.06.2025 
  Completed a 2-month internship focused on Full Stack Java development gained hands-on experience in building 
web applications using front-end and back-end technologies. 
  Worked on developing, testing, and integrating application components while strengthening skills in Java, 
databases, and web development concepts.  
Personal Skills 
  Good verbal and written communication skills 
  Good Problem Solving 
  Adaptable to work environment 
Education 
  B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering 
Mother Theresa Institute of Engineering and Technology  
  Intermediate (MPC  Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry) 
Mother Theresa Junior College  
  10th Standard (SSC)  
  Universal High School

education: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering, Mother Theresa Institute of Engineering and Technology
Intermediate (MPC - Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry), Mother Theresa Junior College
projects: Access Controlled Privacy Preserving Search on Secret-Shared Outsourced Data
experience: Cloud & DevOps Intern at Cloud Institution (19.01.2026 - Present)
Full Stack Java Intern at Skill Dzire (12.04.2025 - 12.06.2025)
strengths: Strong foundation in Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) and modern Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Docker)
B.Tech degree in Computer Science Engineering provides strong theoretical backing
Active internship experience in both DevOps automation and Full-Stack Java development
weaknesses: Lacks the required 5+ years of professional engineering experience; currently a fresher/intern
Missing core modern JavaScript/TypeScript framework skills (React, Node.js, Express, TypeScript) listed as critical for this Lead role
improvementSuggestions: Acquire production-level experience building full-stack applications using React, Node.js, and TypeScript.
Target entry-level Cloud Engineer or Associate DevOps roles rather than Lead-level Full-Stack positions to better match current career tenure.
Develop and showcase projects that feature relational database design (PostgreSQL) and SaaS system architectures.

candidates.name: NAGELLA CHINMAYA SAI
candidates.resumeText:
NAGELLA CHINMAYA SAI 
Tirupati, India  517501 | mobile: 6302746763 |  nagellachinmayasai@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chinmaya-sai-nagella-10b132332 | 
  GitHub:  https://github.com/nagellachinmayasai-code 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 
Computer Science undergraduate with a strong academic record and hands-on experience in 
developing real- time and web-based applications. Skilled in problem-solving, debugging, and 
fundamental programming concepts. Worked on projects including a real-time collaborative coding 
platform, gaining exposure to system design and teamwork. Interested in applying technical 
knowledge and learning through practical experience in a professional environment. 
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
  Languages : Java, Python, C (Basics)  Web : HTML, CSS 
  Database : SQL, DBMS  Tools : GitHub, VS Code 
MINI PROJECTS 
  Real-Time Collaborative Coding Platform  
Developed a multi-user real-time code editor using WebSockets (Socket.io) with live sync, chat, and 
session control. Focused on concurrency and low-latency performance. 
  DebugMate 
Developed a debugging-focused application to simplify error detection and improve development 
workflow efficiency. Designed the interface for better usability and streamlined debugging processes.  
  ChainPulse AI  AI-Based Prototype 
Developed an AI-based prototype focused on improving intelligent workflow and user interaction. 
Designed the interface with emphasis on usability, accessibility, and real-time responsiveness. 
Worked on integrating AI-oriented concepts and collaborative features to enhance user experience. 
EDUCATION 
Bachelor of Technology  Computer Science and Engineering 2023 2027 | CGPA:

600/600 Sri Geethanjali E.M School, Tirupati 
INTERNSHIP 
Data Analytics Virtual Internship 
ApexPlanet Software Pvt. Ltd. 
  Worked on data analytics concepts and project-based tasks. 
  Gained exposure to data handling, visualization, and documentation. 
  Improved analytical thinking and problem-solving skills through virtual assignments. 
CERTIFICATIONS & ACCOMPLISHMENTS 
  Data Analytics Virtual Internship  ApexPlanet Software Pvt. Ltd. 
  Completed a 6-day Workshop on Generative AI 
  Maintained CGPA of 9.25 in B.Tech CSE

candidates.name: Alex Mercer
candidates.resumeText:
ALEX MERCER
Full Stack Dev. 5 Years Experience. React, UI frameworks, Node.js, TS, Express.
Email: alex.mercer.dev@innovations.org | Phone: +1 (555) 892-0044
Skills: React, React-native, Redux, Node.js, Express, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, MongoDB, Git

Experience:
Senior Developer - DevSuite Labs (2022 - Present)
- Developed responsive React dashboard layouts.
- Formulated Express API endpoints serving over 50k active daily sessions.
Software Specialist - WebStream Co (2021 - 2022)
- Spearheaded visual overhauls using Tailwind CSS.

Education:
BS in Computer Science, Ohio State University

education: BS in Computer Science, Ohio State University (2021)
experience: Senior Developer at DevSuite Labs (2022 - Present): Crafted modular UI structures, migrated data endpoints to Express server context.
Software Specialist at WebStream Co (2021 - 2022): Integrated state management with Redux, implemented fluid mobile viewports.
strengths: Solid senior-grade capabilities in client-side React architectures and Tailwind visual designs
Strong competence building unified REST structures and state models
weaknesses: Lacks standard relational database handling (primarily MongoDB, missing PostgreSQL)
No mentioned expertise with containerizing/managing services like Docker or cloud platform systems
improvementSuggestions: Gain experience or certifications related to relational DB modeling and query design.
Add details of system design achievements or pipeline design.
